title: Go JSON import local candidate
scope: Local/copied-DB-and-data JSON import candidate for Prism exported note data.
implemented_behavior: Imports JSON payloads with data.notes and mode skip/duplicate semantics.
Maps category/type names to existing Categories, falls back to default category, and imports tags plus urls/source_urls.
Tracks old note id to new note id mappings for optional attachment restore entries.
Optionally restores attachments/uploads when payload entries provide safe paths plus base64 content.
Runs note import plus optional file restore inside a transaction and removes newly written files on validation or commit failure.
production_boundary: Production owner remains Python. This local copied candidate does not deploy Pi, edit Caddy/systemd, change frontend defaults, touch production DB/files, remove Python, or promote live/default JSON import ownership.
